formatDescription: Discus was label software developed by Magic Mouse Productions. Development stopped after version 4 at the same time Aplle stopped supporting 32-bit software. Discus was releasedas standalone software with 1000's of label options.
provenanceCompoundName: Brigham Young University / Brigham Young University
